command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
BASE='/home/jose/.local/share/moreno-unified-delegator/moreno_hub'

echo '=== core.py ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 "cat $BASE/core.py" 2>&1

echo '=== cli.py ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 "cat $BASE/cli.py" 2>&1

echo '=== CONFIG ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cat /home/jose/.config/moreno-unified-delegator/config.json" 2>&1

echo DONE_1916
